**Focused recurring flags** if a pattern surfaces that doesn't fit `--daily-at`/`--weekly`/`--at`: `--weekdays-at <HH:MM>` (Mon-Fri), `--monthly <day> <HH:MM>`, `--every <duration>` (StartInterval-based). Each ~10 lines. Per the "no speculative abstractions" rule, add when a concrete pattern appears.
**`gcc-schedule doctor --fix`** flag: auto-cleanup of detected drift (rm stale registry entries, bootout phantom agents). Useful but destructive; would need confirm prompt.

**`gcc-schedule lint` for newly-added schedules**: enforce some of the discipline rules at add-time (warn on missing --description for >24h-out schedules, refuse credential-looking values in --command).

**Tighten StartInterval custom-schedule support**: atone-consolidate + claude-ipc registered as `custom-schedule` (kind derivation didn't match). Could add a `daemon` or `interval` kind plus `--every <Ns>` to handle them natively.
